results.title: Graham Platner formally drops out of Maine’s Senate raceHe announced he was leaving Wednesday. On Friday, he made it official.
results.description: Graham Platner formally drops out of Maine’s Senate race He announced he was leaving Wednesday. On Friday, he made it official. July 10, 2026 Graham Platner formally withdrew from the U.S. Senate race Friday, clearing the way for Democrats to choose a new nominee to take on Republican Sen. Susan Collins this fall. The move was widely expected after Platner was accused of sexual assault in 2021 by a Maine woman, who detailed her experience in a story published by Politico on Monday. Platner has broadly denied the allegations, but he announced Wednesday that he was suspending his campaign because...

results.description: This hummingbird feeder comes with an umbrella that helps keep water out of the nectar when it rains. Find it on sale at Amazon.

results.title: Twins complete trade with Toronto for reliever Tommy Nance
results.description: The Twins announced Friday that they have acquired right-handed reliever Tommy Nance from the Toronto Blue Jays, in exchange for minor league catcher/infielder Ryan Sprock and international bonus pool money. Sprock was the Twins’ 8th-round draft pick in 2025. The Twins have been on the lookout for bullpen help for many weeks. Their bullpen has [...] The post Twins complete trade with Toronto for reliever Tommy Nance first appeared on KSTP.com 5 Eyewitness News .

results.title: New law overhauls SCDOT leadership, sets 7-day pothole repair

results.title: Spain secure dramatic World Cup win over Belgium after costly blunder

Quote of the day by Chris Pine: 'The only thing you sometimes have control over is... You don't have control over... But you have a choice about...' Life lessons on resilience, mental clarity, radical acceptance and emotional agility
results.description: Quote of the day by Chris Pine highlights the importance of changing perspective instead of trying to control every situation. The quote explains how resilience, mental clarity, radical acceptance and emotional agility can help people deal with challenges. It also connects with the psychological idea of the locus of control, showing the difference between what people can control and what they cannot in everyday life.
